patch:
--- a/shifter.sv
+++ b/shifter.sv
@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
 module barrel_shifter_32(
     input [31:0] data_in,
     input [4:0] shift_amount,
     input [1:0] shift_type,
-    output [31:0] shifted_data,
+    output [31:0] shifted_data,
     input clk,
-    input valid_in
+    input valid_in,
+    output valid_out
 );
     always @(posedge clk) begin
         case (shift_type)
@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@
             default: shifted_data <= data_in;
         endcase
+        valid_out <= valid_in;
     end
 endmodule
 
@@ -24,7 +25,8 @@
     wire [1:0] shift_type_sel;
     wire output_valid;
     barrel_shifter_32 inst(
         .data_in(input_data),
         .shift_amount(shift_amt),
         .shift_type(shift_type_sel),
         .shifted_data(result),
         .clk(clk),
-        .valid_in(input_valid)
+        .valid_in(input_valid),
+        .valid_out(output_valid)
     );
